summary.productName: Online Course Platform – Content-based, No Video Streaming
goals: Build an online course platform for text, image, and PDF learning content without video streaming.
Allow students to browse, purchase, and permanently access purchased course content.
Allow instructors to create courses, manage curriculum, set pricing, and submit for review.
Allow admins to review courses, manage users, manage taxonomy, and inspect platform statistics.
Enforce email and password authentication, RBAC, route guards, course lifecycle rules, and purchase-based content access.

source.sectionTitle: ① Entry State Machine

narrative.summary: Guest enters the home page from the entry decision.
narrative.taskDescription: Trigger continueAsGuest and navigate to the home page entry state without requiring an existing session.

validations.description: Navigation target should resolve to the home route.
Home should render public guest content without requiring a session.
Guest home should not show duplicated login or register CTAs.

narrative.summary: Entry can route directly to the public course list.
narrative.taskDescription: Trigger browseCourses and navigate to the course list entry state with only published courses visible.

validations.description: Navigation target should resolve to the course list route.
Course list API should expose only published courses.
Each course card should show cover, title, price, and category.

narrative.summary: Entry can route to the login page.
narrative.taskDescription: Trigger chooseLogin and navigate to the login page entry state with the credential form visible.

validations.description: Navigation target should resolve to the login route.
Login page should show the email and password form.
The page should not duplicate a login entry already provided by the header.

narrative.summary: Entry can route to the register page.
narrative.taskDescription: Trigger chooseRegister and navigate to the register page entry state with the registration form visible.

validations.description: Navigation target should resolve to the register route.
Register page should show the registration form.
The page should not duplicate a register entry already provided by the header.

source.sectionTitle: ② Home Page State Machine

narrative.summary: Home page loads its public content.
narrative.taskDescription: Render the homepage content and make the public entry points available in the main content area.

validations.description: Home should show public entry content and featured content after loading completes.
Primary CTAs should live in the page content instead of duplicating header actions.

narrative.summary: Entry reaches the home page.
narrative.taskDescription: Receive the guest navigation from Entry and open the HomePage entry state.

validations.description: Entry-to-home navigation should resolve to /.

narrative.summary: Home can navigate to the course list page.
narrative.taskDescription: Trigger browseCourses from the ready state and navigate to the course list entry state without forcing login.

validations.description: Navigation target should resolve to /courses.
Course browsing from home should remain public.

narrative.summary: Home can navigate to login.
narrative.taskDescription: Trigger chooseLogin from the home ready state and open the login page entry state.

validations.description: Navigation target should resolve to /login.
Logged-in users should not see a duplicated login action.

narrative.summary: Home can navigate to registration.
narrative.taskDescription: Trigger chooseRegister from the home ready state and open the register page entry state.

validations.description: Navigation target should resolve to /register.
Logged-in users should not see a duplicated register action.

source.sectionTitle: ③ Login Page State Machine

narrative.summary: Login page shows the credential form.
narrative.taskDescription: Render the login form with editable email and password inputs before any submission occurs.

validations.description: Guest header should only expose public navigation on the login page.
Email and password fields should be visible and editable.
The submit button should be visible and enabled before submission.

narrative.summary: Entry can reach login.
narrative.taskDescription: Receive the login navigation from Entry and open the login page entry state.

validations.description: Entry-to-login navigation should resolve to /login.

narrative.summary: Login page starts the authentication feature.
narrative.taskDescription: Submit credentials from the login ready state and enter the authentication feature idle entry point.

validations.description: Submitting login should show loading and disable the submit button to prevent duplicates.
The request payload should only contain email and password.

narrative.summary: Login page can switch to registration.
narrative.taskDescription: Trigger chooseRegister from the login ready state and navigate to the register page entry state.

validations.description: Navigation target should resolve to /register.
Switching pages should clear login errors and reset the register form state correctly.

narrative.summary: Login page can return to public course browsing.
narrative.taskDescription: Trigger browseWithoutLogin from the login ready state and navigate to the course list entry state.

validations.description: Navigation target should resolve to /courses.
Course browsing from login should still show only published courses.

source.sectionTitle: ④ Register Page State Machine

narrative.summary: Register page shows the registration form.
narrative.taskDescription: Render the registration form with required hints and password constraints before any submission occurs.

validations.description: Guest header should not expose protected navigation on the register page.
Required field hints and password length guidance should be visible.
The submit action should remain available before the form is sent.

narrative.summary: Entry can reach the register page.
narrative.taskDescription: Receive the register navigation from Entry and open the register page entry state.

validations.description: Entry-to-register navigation should resolve to /register.

narrative.summary: Home can navigate to register.
narrative.taskDescription: Receive the register navigation from home and open the register page entry state.

validations.description: Home-to-register navigation should resolve to /register.

narrative.summary: Login can switch to register.
narrative.taskDescription: Receive the switch-to-register navigation from login and open the register page entry state.

validations.description: Login-to-register navigation should resolve to /register.

narrative.summary: Register page starts the registration feature.
narrative.taskDescription: Submit the registration form from the ready state and enter the registration feature entry point.

validations.description: Submitting registration should show loading and disable the submit button.

narrative.summary: Register page can switch back to login.
narrative.taskDescription: Trigger chooseLogin from the register ready state and navigate to the login page entry state.

validations.description: Navigation target should resolve to /login.
Switching pages should clear registration errors and show a clean login form.

narrative.summary: Register page can return to public course browsing.
narrative.taskDescription: Trigger browseWithoutRegister from the register ready state and navigate to the course list entry state.

validations.description: Navigation target should resolve to /courses.
Browsing courses from register should not create any session or temporary identity.

source.sectionTitle: ⑤ Courses List Page State Machine

narrative.summary: Course list starts loading.
narrative.taskDescription: Request the published course list immediately after entering the page and show a loading state.

validations.description: Any role can enter /courses but guest header must not expose protected entries.
Loading should not show stale data together with the new loading skeleton.

narrative.summary: Course list receives published courses.
narrative.taskDescription: Render the course list after a successful API response with at least one published course.

validations.description: Course list API returns 200 with at least one item.
Each course card should show cover, title, price, and category, and only published courses should appear.

narrative.summary: Course list becomes empty.
narrative.taskDescription: Show a dedicated empty state when the course list API succeeds with zero results.

validations.description: Course list API returns 200 with no items.
Empty state must not be confused with 4xx or 5xx failures.

narrative.summary: Course list load fails.
narrative.taskDescription: Show a retriable error state when the course list request fails.

validations.description: A failed list request should show a clear error and retry option.
Failure must not be displayed as an empty list.

narrative.summary: Empty course list can refresh.
narrative.taskDescription: Restart the course list loading flow from the empty state.

validations.description: Refresh should send a new list request and either restore Ready or remain Empty.

narrative.summary: Failed course list can retry.
narrative.taskDescription: Restart the course list loading flow from the failed state.

validations.description: Retry should clear the previous error and render either Ready or Empty after the new response.

narrative.summary: Entry can open the course list.
narrative.taskDescription: Receive public navigation from Entry and enter the course list page.

validations.description: Entry navigation should resolve to /courses.

narrative.summary: Home can open the course list.
narrative.taskDescription: Receive browseCourses from HomePage.Ready and enter the course list page.

validations.description: Home navigation should resolve to /courses.

narrative.summary: Login can return to public browsing.
narrative.taskDescription: Receive browseWithoutLogin from LoginPage.Ready and enter the course list page.

validations.description: Login navigation should resolve to /courses.

narrative.summary: Register can return to public browsing.
narrative.taskDescription: Receive browseWithoutRegister from RegisterPage.Ready and enter the course list page.

validations.description: Register navigation should resolve to /courses.

narrative.summary: Course list opens a course detail.
narrative.taskDescription: Trigger openCourse from the ready state and enter the course detail page for the selected course.

validations.description: Navigation should resolve to /courses/:courseId.
Course detail should reload the selected course by courseId instead of relying only on list cache.

narrative.summary: Course list can return home.
narrative.taskDescription: Trigger goHome from the ready state and navigate back to the home page.

validations.description: Navigation should resolve to /.

source.sectionTitle: ⑥ Course Detail Page State Machine

narrative.summary: Course detail starts loading.
narrative.taskDescription: Load the selected course details by courseId and show a detail skeleton while CTA actions remain unavailable.

validations.description: The route is publicly reachable but visibility depends on course state and identity.
Purchase and reading CTAs must stay disabled until detail loading completes.

narrative.summary: Course detail becomes visible.
narrative.taskDescription: Render the marketing details and curriculum outline when the course is visible to the current user.

validations.description: The detail API should return 200 with title, description, category, tags, price, cover image, status, and outline data.
Unpurchased users should see only lesson titles and order, not content or attachment downloads.

narrative.summary: Course detail is hidden.
narrative.taskDescription: Show an unavailable state when the course is not published and the current user is neither the author nor an admin.

validations.description: The page should behave like 404 and not leak the course existence, price, or author details.

narrative.summary: Course detail load fails.
narrative.taskDescription: Show a retriable error state when the detail request fails for non-permission reasons.

validations.description: Non-permission failures should show a retriable error without leaking protected content.

narrative.summary: Course detail can retry.
narrative.taskDescription: Restart the course detail loading flow from the failed state.

validations.description: Retry should reload the detail request and remove the error once data becomes available.

narrative.summary: Course list can reach course detail.
narrative.taskDescription: Receive openCourse from the course list and enter the selected course detail page.

validations.description: Navigation should resolve to /courses/:courseId.

narrative.summary: Course detail can start purchase.
narrative.taskDescription: Trigger startPurchase from the visible detail state and enter the purchase feature.

validations.description: Purchase CTA should appear only for signed-in students or instructors who have not yet purchased the course.

narrative.summary: Course detail can open the reader.
narrative.taskDescription: Trigger openReader from the visible detail state and enter the course reader for authorized users.

validations.description: Navigation should resolve to /my-courses/:courseId.
The reader API must re-check author, purchaser, or admin access before returning content.

narrative.summary: Course detail can return to the course list.
narrative.taskDescription: Trigger backToCourses from the visible detail state and navigate back to the course list.

validations.description: Navigation should resolve to /courses.

narrative.summary: Unavailable course detail can return to the list.
narrative.taskDescription: Trigger backToCourses from the unavailable state and navigate back to the public course list.

validations.description: Returning to the list must not expose the hidden course or any extra information about it.

source.sectionTitle: ⑦ My Courses Page State Machine

narrative.summary: My courses starts loading.
narrative.taskDescription: Load the signed-in user's purchased course library and show a loading state.

validations.description: Guest users must not gain direct access to purchased course data.
The list must not leak purchase data from the previous signed-in user.

narrative.summary: My courses receives purchased courses.
narrative.taskDescription: Render the purchased course library when at least one owned course is returned.

validations.description: The API should return 200 and only courses owned by the current user.
Each row should show cover, title, instructor, purchase date, and completion progress.

narrative.summary: My courses becomes empty.
narrative.taskDescription: Show an empty library state when the owned course query succeeds with no results.

validations.description: The API should return 200 and no owned courses.
The empty state must not mask a permission or network failure.

narrative.summary: My courses blocks unauthenticated access.
narrative.taskDescription: Move to a forbidden state when the request is attempted without a valid session.

validations.description: Unauthenticated access should yield the login strategy consistently and load no purchase records.

narrative.summary: My courses load fails.
narrative.taskDescription: Show a retriable error state when the library request fails for reasons other than access control.

validations.description: Failures should show an error and retry entry without being confused with the empty state.

narrative.summary: My courses can retry.
narrative.taskDescription: Restart the library loading flow from the failed state.

validations.description: Retry should fetch the current user's latest purchase and progress state.

narrative.summary: My courses can open an owned course reader.
narrative.taskDescription: Trigger openOwnedCourse from the library and open the reader for an authorized course.

validations.description: Navigation should resolve to /my-courses/:courseId.
The backend must re-check purchaser, author, or admin access before sending protected content.

narrative.summary: My courses can browse more courses.
narrative.taskDescription: Trigger browseMore from the owned course library and return to the public course list.

validations.description: Navigation should resolve to /courses.

narrative.summary: Empty my courses can browse courses.
narrative.taskDescription: Trigger browseCourses from the empty library state and open the public course list.

validations.description: Navigation should resolve to /courses.

narrative.summary: Blocked my courses can request login.
narrative.taskDescription: Trigger requestSignIn from the forbidden library state and redirect to login.

validations.description: Navigation should resolve to /login.
After logging in successfully, the user should be able to return and load their own library data.

source.sectionTitle: ⑧ Course Reader Page State Machine

narrative.summary: Course reader starts loading.
narrative.taskDescription: Load the selected course reader data and show a protected loading skeleton.

validations.description: Only author, purchaser, or admin may access the reader route and data.
Text, image, and PDF download entries remain unavailable while loading.

narrative.summary: Course reader access is granted.
narrative.taskDescription: Render the course outline, lesson content types, and completion status when access is allowed.

validations.description: The reader API should return 200 with sections, lessons, content types, and completion state.
Protected PDF download links must remain available only to authorized users.

narrative.summary: Course reader access is blocked.
narrative.taskDescription: Show a forbidden state when the current user lacks author, purchase, or admin permission.

validations.description: Blocked access should show 403-style denial and render no lesson content.

narrative.summary: Course reader load fails.
narrative.taskDescription: Show a retriable error state when reader loading fails for non-permission reasons.

validations.description: System failures must not be shown as 403 and should offer retry.

narrative.summary: Course reader opens a lesson.
narrative.taskDescription: Open the selected lesson content from the outline and highlight the active lesson.

validations.description: Rendered text, image, or PDF content should be safe from injection and match the selected lesson.

narrative.summary: Course reader can retry.
narrative.taskDescription: Restart the reader loading flow after a non-permission failure.

validations.description: Retry should restore outline and content display when successful.

narrative.summary: Course detail can open the reader.
narrative.taskDescription: Receive openReader from course detail and enter the course reader page.

validations.description: Navigation should resolve to /my-courses/:courseId.

narrative.summary: My courses can open the reader.
narrative.taskDescription: Receive openOwnedCourse from my courses and enter the reader page.

validations.description: Navigation should resolve to /my-courses/:courseId.

narrative.summary: Reader can return to course detail.
narrative.taskDescription: Trigger viewCourseInfo from the reader outline and reopen course detail.

validations.description: Navigation should resolve to /courses/:courseId.
The course detail page should preserve the correct purchase or reader CTA state.

narrative.summary: Reader can start lesson completion.
narrative.taskDescription: Trigger markLessonComplete from the active lesson and enter the lesson completion feature.

validations.description: The completion action should disable duplicate submissions for the same lesson.

narrative.summary: Reader can return to my courses.
narrative.taskDescription: Trigger backToLibrary from the active lesson and reopen the owned course library.

validations.description: Navigation should resolve to /my-courses.
Progress in the library should refresh to the latest completed lesson count.

narrative.summary: Forbidden reader can return to course detail.
narrative.taskDescription: Trigger backToCourse from the forbidden reader state and reopen course detail.

validations.description: The returned detail page must show only marketing information and no lesson content leakage.

source.sectionTitle: ⑨ Instructor Courses Page State Machine

narrative.summary: Instructor course management starts loading.
narrative.taskDescription: Load the instructor-owned or admin-managed course list and show a loading state.

validations.description: Only instructor or admin may access this page and previous data must not remain visible.

narrative.summary: Instructor course management receives courses.
narrative.taskDescription: Render managed courses with status and available actions once data is returned.

validations.description: The API should return 200 and only the instructor's courses or admin-manageable courses.
Each managed course should expose draft, submitted, published, rejected, archived status and matching actions.

narrative.summary: Instructor course management becomes empty.
narrative.taskDescription: Show an empty state with a create-course entry when no managed courses exist.

validations.description: Empty state must not be used to hide permission errors.

narrative.summary: Instructor course management blocks unauthorized roles.
narrative.taskDescription: Show a forbidden state when student or guest access is attempted.

validations.description: Unauthorized access should return 403 and expose no teacher controls or course data.

narrative.summary: Instructor course management load fails.
narrative.taskDescription: Show a retriable error state when course management data cannot be loaded.

validations.description: The page should show an error and not display partial course status data.

narrative.summary: Instructor course management can retry.
narrative.taskDescription: Restart managed course loading from the failed state.

validations.description: Retry should refresh the latest course status and available actions.

narrative.summary: Instructor courses can create a new course.
narrative.taskDescription: Trigger createCourse from the ready state and open the new course page.

validations.description: Navigation should resolve to /instructor/courses/new.

narrative.summary: Instructor courses can edit a course.
narrative.taskDescription: Trigger editCourse from the ready state and open the course edit page.

validations.description: Navigation should resolve to /instructor/courses/:courseId/edit.
Only the author or admin should be able to edit the selected course.

narrative.summary: Instructor courses can open curriculum management.
narrative.taskDescription: Trigger manageCurriculum from the ready state and open the curriculum editor.

validations.description: Navigation should resolve to /instructor/courses/:courseId/curriculum.

narrative.summary: Instructor courses can start submission for review.
narrative.taskDescription: Trigger submitForReview from the ready state and enter the submit course feature.

validations.description: Only draft or rejected courses should enter the submission flow.

narrative.summary: Instructor courses can change publish state.
narrative.taskDescription: Trigger togglePublishState from the ready state and enter the course lifecycle feature.

validations.description: Only published or archived courses should enter the lifecycle flow.

narrative.summary: Instructor courses can return to marketplace.
narrative.taskDescription: Trigger viewMarketplace from the ready state and open the public course list.

validations.description: Navigation should resolve to /courses.

narrative.summary: Empty instructor courses can create a first course.
narrative.taskDescription: Trigger createFirstCourse from the empty state and open the new course page.

validations.description: Navigation should resolve to /instructor/courses/new.

narrative.summary: Forbidden instructor courses can return to marketplace.
narrative.taskDescription: Trigger backToCourses from the forbidden state and open the public course list.

validations.description: Returning from a forbidden state must reveal no teacher-only data or controls.

source.sectionTitle: ⑩ New Course Page State Machine

narrative.summary: New course page shows the draft form.
narrative.taskDescription: Render the course draft form with required metadata fields and validation hints.

validations.description: Only instructor or admin may enter the page and fields for title, description, category, tags, price, and cover must be visible.
Price validation should enforce price >= 0 and unsaved data should remain out of the database.

narrative.summary: Instructor courses can open new course.
narrative.taskDescription: Receive createCourse from the instructor course list and open the new course page.

validations.description: Navigation should resolve to /instructor/courses/new.

narrative.summary: New course page can save a draft.
narrative.taskDescription: Trigger saveDraft from the new course form and enter the create course feature.

validations.description: Submitting the draft should disable duplicate submissions.

narrative.summary: New course page can cancel back to instructor courses.
narrative.taskDescription: Trigger cancelCreate from the draft form and return to the instructor course list.

validations.description: Canceling should not create any new course record from unsaved form data.

source.sectionTitle: ⑪ Edit Course Page State Machine

narrative.summary: Edit course starts loading.
narrative.taskDescription: Load editable course data by courseId and keep the form locked until it arrives.

validations.description: Only the author or admin should be able to open the edit page.

narrative.summary: Edit course receives course data.
narrative.taskDescription: Prefill the form with the current editable course metadata after a successful load.

validations.description: The API should return 200 with editable course fields, tags, category, price, cover, and status.

narrative.summary: Edit course hides unauthorized content.
narrative.taskDescription: Show a hidden state when a non-author non-admin tries to access the page.

validations.description: The page should behave like 404 and not expose the course title, price, or review status.

narrative.summary: Edit course load fails.
narrative.taskDescription: Show a retriable error state when editable course loading fails for non-permission reasons.

validations.description: A load failure must not be misrepresented as a 404 hidden state.

narrative.summary: Edit course can retry.
narrative.taskDescription: Restart editable course loading from the failed state.

validations.description: Retry should restore form prefill and attachment data if successful.

narrative.summary: Instructor courses can open course editing.
narrative.taskDescription: Receive editCourse from the instructor course list and open the course edit page.

validations.description: Navigation should resolve to /instructor/courses/:courseId/edit.

narrative.summary: Edit course can save changes.
narrative.taskDescription: Trigger saveCourse from the ready state and enter the update course feature.

validations.description: Only author or admin should be able to submit changes and duplicate submissions should be blocked.

narrative.summary: Edit course can open curriculum editor.
narrative.taskDescription: Trigger editCurriculum from the ready state and open the curriculum editor.

validations.description: Navigation should resolve to /instructor/courses/:courseId/curriculum.

narrative.summary: Edit course can return to instructor courses.
narrative.taskDescription: Trigger backToInstructorCourses from the ready state and return to the managed course list.

validations.description: The list should reflect the correct course state without duplicate rows.

narrative.summary: Hidden edit course can return to instructor courses.
narrative.taskDescription: Trigger backToInstructorCourses from the hidden state and return to the managed course list.

validations.description: The managed list should omit unauthorized courses after returning.

source.sectionTitle: ⑫ Curriculum Editor Page State Machine

narrative.summary: Curriculum editor starts loading.
narrative.taskDescription: Load sections and lessons for the selected course before enabling reordering or mutation.

validations.description: Only the author or admin may operate curriculum management and ordering must stay disabled while loading.

narrative.summary: Curriculum editor receives curriculum data.
narrative.taskDescription: Render sections, lessons, order, and content types after curriculum data is loaded.

validations.description: The API should return 200 with sections, lessons, order, and content type data.

narrative.summary: Curriculum editor hides unauthorized access.
narrative.taskDescription: Show a hidden state when a non-author non-admin tries to access curriculum data.

validations.description: The page should act like 404 and expose no curriculum title or content-type details.

narrative.summary: Curriculum editor load fails.
narrative.taskDescription: Show a retriable error state when curriculum loading fails for non-permission reasons.

validations.description: The failure must not be shown as an empty curriculum.

narrative.summary: Curriculum editor can retry.
narrative.taskDescription: Restart curriculum loading from the failed state.

validations.description: Retry should restore the latest section and lesson ordering if successful.

narrative.summary: Instructor courses can open curriculum editor.
narrative.taskDescription: Receive manageCurriculum from instructor courses and open curriculum editor.

validations.description: Navigation should resolve to /instructor/courses/:courseId/curriculum.

narrative.summary: Edit course can open curriculum editor.
narrative.taskDescription: Receive editCurriculum from course editing and open curriculum editor.

validations.description: Navigation should resolve to /instructor/courses/:courseId/curriculum.

narrative.summary: Curriculum editor can save curriculum mutations.
narrative.taskDescription: Trigger saveCurriculum from the ready state and enter the curriculum mutation feature.

validations.description: Section, lesson, ordering, content type, and attachments should all be sent together in the mutation flow.

narrative.summary: Curriculum editor can return to course form.
narrative.taskDescription: Trigger backToCourseForm from the ready state and reopen course editing for the same course.

validations.description: Returning to the edit page should preserve the same course context.

narrative.summary: Curriculum editor can return to instructor courses.
narrative.taskDescription: Trigger backToInstructorCourses from the ready state and return to the instructor course list.

validations.description: Returning should keep the course author and status unchanged unless a mutation succeeded.

narrative.summary: Hidden curriculum editor can return to instructor courses.
narrative.taskDescription: Trigger backToInstructorCourses from the hidden state and return to the instructor course list.

validations.description: Returning should not expose protected curriculum information in the list.

source.sectionTitle: ⑬ Admin Review Page State Machine

narrative.summary: Admin review starts loading.
narrative.taskDescription: Load the submitted course queue for review and show a loading state.

validations.description: Only admins may access the review queue and old queue data must not remain visible.

narrative.summary: Admin review receives submitted courses.
narrative.taskDescription: Render the submitted review queue once the request succeeds with queued items.

validations.description: The API should return 200 with submitted courses only.

narrative.summary: Admin review queue becomes empty.
narrative.taskDescription: Show an empty queue state when there are no submitted courses to review.

validations.description: The empty queue must not be caused by an authorization or system failure.

narrative.summary: Admin review blocks unauthorized users.
narrative.taskDescription: Show a forbidden state when non-admin access is attempted.

validations.description: Unauthorized access should show 403 and no backend data should be loaded.

narrative.summary: Admin review load fails.
narrative.taskDescription: Show a retriable error state when the review queue request fails.

validations.description: System failure must not be represented as an empty queue.

narrative.summary: Admin review can retry.
narrative.taskDescription: Restart review queue loading from the failed state.

validations.description: Retry should reload the latest submitted course queue.

narrative.summary: Admin review can start a review decision.
narrative.taskDescription: Trigger reviewCourse from the ready queue and enter the review decision feature.

validations.description: Only submitted courses should enter the decision flow and rejection must require a reason.

narrative.summary: Admin review can open course management.
narrative.taskDescription: Trigger openCourseManagement from the ready queue and open admin course management.

validations.description: Navigation should resolve to /admin/courses.

narrative.summary: Admin review can open taxonomy management.
narrative.taskDescription: Trigger openTaxonomy from the ready queue and open admin taxonomy management.

validations.description: Navigation should resolve to /admin/taxonomy.

narrative.summary: Admin review can open user management.
narrative.taskDescription: Trigger openUsers from the ready queue and open admin user management.

validations.description: Navigation should resolve to /admin/users.

narrative.summary: Admin review can open platform stats.
narrative.taskDescription: Trigger openStats from the ready queue and open the admin stats page.

validations.description: Navigation should resolve to /admin/stats.

narrative.summary: Empty admin review can open course management.
narrative.taskDescription: Trigger openCourseManagement from the empty state and open admin course management.

validations.description: Navigation should resolve to /admin/courses.

narrative.summary: Forbidden admin review can return to public courses.
narrative.taskDescription: Trigger backToCourses from the forbidden state and open the public course list.

validations.description: Returning must preserve no admin data or entry visibility.

source.sectionTitle: ⑭ Admin Courses Page State Machine

narrative.summary: Admin courses starts loading.
narrative.taskDescription: Load the global course management list and show a loading state.

validations.description: Only admins may access the page and stale global course data should not remain visible.

narrative.summary: Admin courses receives course data.
narrative.taskDescription: Render global course management data for all relevant statuses.

validations.description: The API should return 200 and show published, archived, and other managed statuses.

narrative.summary: Admin courses blocks unauthorized users.
narrative.taskDescription: Show a forbidden state when non-admin access is attempted.

validations.description: Unauthorized access should show 403 and no global course actions.

narrative.summary: Admin courses load fails.
narrative.taskDescription: Show a retriable error state when global course management loading fails.

validations.description: System failure must not be shown as empty data.

narrative.summary: Admin courses can retry.
narrative.taskDescription: Restart admin course management loading from the failed state.

validations.description: Retry should reload the latest global course states and actions.

narrative.summary: Admin courses can change course lifecycle.
narrative.taskDescription: Trigger changeCourseState from the ready state and enter the course lifecycle feature.

validations.description: Only published and archived courses should enter the lifecycle flow.

narrative.summary: Admin courses can return to review queue.
narrative.taskDescription: Trigger openReviewQueue from the ready state and open the admin review queue.

validations.description: Navigation should resolve to /admin/review.

narrative.summary: Admin courses can open taxonomy management.
narrative.taskDescription: Trigger openTaxonomy from the ready state and open admin taxonomy management.

validations.description: Navigation should resolve to /admin/taxonomy.

narrative.summary: Admin courses can open stats.
narrative.taskDescription: Trigger openStats from the ready state and open the admin stats page.

validations.description: Stats should reflect the latest course state distribution.

narrative.summary: Forbidden admin courses can return to public courses.
narrative.taskDescription: Trigger backToCourses from the forbidden state and open the public course list.

validations.description: No global course management data should remain visible after returning.

source.sectionTitle: ⑮ Admin Taxonomy Page State Machine

narrative.summary: Admin taxonomy starts loading.
narrative.taskDescription: Load taxonomy categories and tags for admin management.

validations.description: Only admins may access taxonomy management and old results should not remain visible.

narrative.summary: Admin taxonomy receives taxonomy data.
narrative.taskDescription: Render categories, tags, and active state once taxonomy data is loaded.

validations.description: The API should return 200 with categories, tags, and is_active state.

narrative.summary: Admin taxonomy blocks unauthorized users.
narrative.taskDescription: Show a forbidden state when non-admin access is attempted.

validations.description: Unauthorized access should show 403 and no taxonomy controls.

narrative.summary: Admin taxonomy load fails.
narrative.taskDescription: Show a retriable error state when taxonomy loading fails.

validations.description: Failure must not be confused with an empty taxonomy dataset.

narrative.summary: Admin taxonomy can retry.
narrative.taskDescription: Restart taxonomy loading from the failed state.

validations.description: Retry should restore the latest active and inactive taxonomy state.

narrative.summary: Admin taxonomy can mutate taxonomy data.
narrative.taskDescription: Trigger manageTaxonomy from the ready state and enter the taxonomy mutation feature.

validations.description: Only admins may enter this mutation flow and data consistency must be preserved.

narrative.summary: Admin taxonomy can return to review queue.
narrative.taskDescription: Trigger openReviewQueue from the ready state and open the admin review queue.

validations.description: Navigation should resolve to /admin/review.

narrative.summary: Admin taxonomy can open user management.
narrative.taskDescription: Trigger openUsers from the ready state and open admin user management.

validations.description: Navigation should resolve to /admin/users.

narrative.summary: Admin taxonomy can open stats.
narrative.taskDescription: Trigger openStats from the ready state and open the admin stats page.

validations.description: Taxonomy changes should be consumable by downstream pages and reflected in later statistics views.

narrative.summary: Forbidden admin taxonomy can return to public courses.
narrative.taskDescription: Trigger backToCourses from the forbidden state and open the public course list.

validations.description: Returning should hide taxonomy management entry points.

source.sectionTitle: ⑯ Admin Users Page State Machine

narrative.summary: Admin users starts loading.
narrative.taskDescription: Load the user list for admin management and show a loading state.

validations.description: Only admins may access user management and stale user data should not remain visible.

narrative.summary: Admin users receives user data.
narrative.taskDescription: Render email, primary role, and activation state once the user list request succeeds.

validations.description: The API should return 200 with email, primary role, and is_active fields.

narrative.summary: Admin users blocks unauthorized users.
narrative.taskDescription: Show a forbidden state when non-admin access is attempted.

validations.description: Unauthorized access should show 403 and load no user data.

narrative.summary: Admin users load fails.
narrative.taskDescription: Show a retriable error state when the user list request fails.

validations.description: System failures must not be shown as an empty user list.

narrative.summary: Admin users can retry.
narrative.taskDescription: Restart user list loading from the failed state.

validations.description: Retry should reload the latest roles and activation states.

narrative.summary: Admin users can start user management actions.
narrative.taskDescription: Trigger manageUserAccount from the ready state and enter the user management feature.

validations.description: Only admins may mutate user role or activation state and the corresponding records must be updated consistently.

narrative.summary: Admin users can return to review queue.
narrative.taskDescription: Trigger openReviewQueue from the ready state and open the admin review queue.

validations.description: Navigation should resolve to /admin/review.

narrative.summary: Admin users can open taxonomy management.
narrative.taskDescription: Trigger openTaxonomy from the ready state and open admin taxonomy management.

validations.description: Loaded user data should not bleed into the taxonomy page context.

narrative.summary: Admin users can open platform stats.
narrative.taskDescription: Trigger openStats from the ready state and open the admin stats page.

validations.description: User count statistics should match the latest user list contents.

narrative.summary: Forbidden admin users can return to public courses.
narrative.taskDescription: Trigger backToCourses from the forbidden state and open the public course list.

validations.description: No user-management data or admin entry should remain visible after returning.

source.sectionTitle: ⑰ Admin Stats Page State Machine

narrative.summary: Admin stats starts loading.
narrative.taskDescription: Load the platform statistics dashboard and show a loading state.

validations.description: Only admins may access platform statistics and stale numbers should not remain visible.

narrative.summary: Admin stats receives platform metrics.
narrative.taskDescription: Render course count, purchase count, and user count when the stats request succeeds.

validations.description: The API should return 200 with platform course, purchase, and user counts.
Statistics should stay consistent with other admin pages.

narrative.summary: Admin stats blocks unauthorized users.
narrative.taskDescription: Show a forbidden state when non-admin access is attempted.

validations.description: Unauthorized access should show 403 and reveal no statistics.

narrative.summary: Admin stats load fails.
narrative.taskDescription: Show a retriable error state when the stats request fails.

validations.description: System failure must not be displayed as zero or empty stats.

narrative.summary: Admin stats can retry.
narrative.taskDescription: Restart stats loading from the failed state.

validations.description: Retry should load numbers that match the latest database state.

narrative.summary: Admin stats can return to review queue.
narrative.taskDescription: Trigger openReviewQueue from the ready state and open the admin review queue.

validations.description: Leaving stats should not affect review queue loading behavior.

narrative.summary: Admin stats can open course management.
narrative.taskDescription: Trigger openCourseManagement from the ready state and open admin course management.

validations.description: Course-state statistics should correspond to the admin course management list.

narrative.summary: Admin stats can open user management.
narrative.taskDescription: Trigger openUsers from the ready state and open admin user management.

validations.description: User count statistics should match the user management list length.

narrative.summary: Admin stats can return to marketplace.
narrative.taskDescription: Trigger openMarketplace from the ready state and open the public course list.

validations.description: Public course list should not show admin-only controls after leaving the backend.

narrative.summary: Forbidden admin stats can return to public courses.
narrative.taskDescription: Trigger backToCourses from the forbidden state and open the public course list.

validations.description: No statistics or backend entry points should remain visible after returning.

source.sectionTitle: ⑱ Auth Login Feature State Machine

narrative.summary: Login feature submits credentials.
narrative.taskDescription: Send the email and password to the login API while preventing duplicate submission.

validations.description: Entering the feature alone must not create a session and submitting must disable the submit button.

narrative.summary: Login authenticates a student.
narrative.taskDescription: Create a student session and switch navigation visibility to the student role.

validations.description: The API should return 200 and establish a student session.
The header should show my courses and logout, but not instructor or admin entries.

narrative.summary: Login authenticates an instructor.
narrative.taskDescription: Create an instructor session and switch navigation visibility to the instructor role.

validations.description: The API should return 200 and establish an instructor session.
The header should show courses, my courses, instructor management, and logout, but not admin entry.

narrative.summary: Login authenticates an admin.
narrative.taskDescription: Create an admin session and enable backend access.

validations.description: The API should return 200 and establish an admin session.
The header should show admin entry and logout and allow access to /admin/*.

narrative.summary: Login rejects invalid credentials.
narrative.taskDescription: Show a login failure state without creating any session.

validations.description: The API should return 401 and no protected navigation should appear.

narrative.summary: Login page starts login feature.
narrative.taskDescription: Receive submitCredentials from login page and enter the login feature.

validations.description: Submitting login should send only email and password and show loading.

narrative.summary: Student login returns to course browsing.
narrative.taskDescription: Trigger loginAsStudent after successful student authentication and open the public course list.

validations.description: Navigation should resolve to /courses.

narrative.summary: Instructor login returns to instructor management.
narrative.taskDescription: Trigger loginAsInstructor after successful instructor authentication and open instructor course management.

validations.description: Navigation should resolve to /instructor/courses.

narrative.summary: Admin login returns to review queue.
narrative.taskDescription: Trigger loginAsAdmin after successful admin authentication and open the admin review queue.

validations.description: Navigation should resolve to /admin/review.

narrative.summary: Denied login returns to login page.
narrative.taskDescription: Trigger retryLogin after denied authentication and reopen the login page.

validations.description: The login page should preserve the failure hint but clear the password field.

source.sectionTitle: ⑲ Auth Register Feature State Machine

narrative.summary: Registration feature submits registration data.
narrative.taskDescription: Send the registration payload while disabling duplicate submits.

validations.description: Entering the registration feature must not automatically create a session or privilege change.

narrative.summary: Registration feature creates a new user.
narrative.taskDescription: Create the new user record with a unique email and valid password hash.

validations.description: The API should return 201 and create a new user record.
The created account should follow the default non-admin registration rule.

narrative.summary: Registration feature rejects invalid registration.
narrative.taskDescription: Show field-level errors and keep the database unchanged when registration is invalid.

validations.description: The API should return 400 for duplicate email, invalid format, or short password and create no user.

narrative.summary: Register page starts registration feature.
narrative.taskDescription: Receive submitRegistration from the register page and enter the registration feature.

validations.description: Registration submission should show loading and disable duplicate submissions.

narrative.summary: Successful registration leads to login.
narrative.taskDescription: Trigger proceedToLogin after successful registration and reopen the login page.

validations.description: Navigation should resolve to /login.

narrative.summary: Rejected registration returns to register page.
narrative.taskDescription: Trigger retryRegister after failed registration and reopen the registration page.

validations.description: The register page should preserve the necessary error hints for correction.

source.sectionTitle: ⑳ Purchase Course Feature State Machine

narrative.summary: Purchase feature submits a purchase.
narrative.taskDescription: Send the purchase request while preventing duplicate purchase attempts.

validations.description: Only eligible signed-in student or instructor users with an unpublished-unowned course should enter the flow and the button should disable after confirmation.

narrative.summary: Purchase feature records a purchase.
narrative.taskDescription: Create the purchase record and grant permanent course access when purchase succeeds.

validations.description: The API should return 201 or equivalent and create the purchase row with user_id, course_id, and created_at.

narrative.summary: Purchase feature blocks duplicate ownership.
narrative.taskDescription: Show an already-owned state when the user has already purchased the course.

validations.description: No duplicate purchase row should be inserted.

narrative.summary: Purchase feature blocks an invalid purchase.
narrative.taskDescription: Reject the purchase when the course is not purchasable or the user lacks permission.

validations.description: No purchase should be created and no content access should be granted.

narrative.summary: Course detail starts purchase feature.
narrative.taskDescription: Receive startPurchase from course detail and enter the purchase feature.

validations.description: The purchase CTA should appear only to eligible signed-in non-owner student or instructor users.

narrative.summary: Successful purchase opens my courses.
narrative.taskDescription: Trigger openOwnedLibrary after purchase and open the owned course library.

validations.description: Navigation should resolve to /my-courses.
The new course should appear immediately with initial progress 0 over total lessons.

narrative.summary: Already-owned purchase returns to course detail.
narrative.taskDescription: Trigger returnToCourse after duplicate purchase blocking and reopen course detail.

validations.description: The course detail page should now show an owned or read CTA rather than a repurchase option.

narrative.summary: Blocked purchase returns to course detail.
narrative.taskDescription: Trigger returnToCourse after blocked purchase and reopen course detail.

validations.description: The original permission and purchase state must remain unchanged after returning.

source.sectionTitle: ㉑ Lesson Completion Feature State Machine

narrative.summary: Lesson completion submits progress.
narrative.taskDescription: Send the lesson-progress update while preventing duplicate completion requests.

validations.description: Only authorized signed-in users should enter the completion flow and the action must disable duplicate submission.

narrative.summary: Lesson completion stores progress.
narrative.taskDescription: Mark the lesson as complete and update progress counts after a successful request.

validations.description: The API should return 200 and set LessonProgress.is_completed to true with updated completed_at.

narrative.summary: Lesson completion rejects invalid progress writes.
narrative.taskDescription: Reject completion when the user is unauthorized or the data is inconsistent.

validations.description: No lesson progress record should be incorrectly marked complete when blocked.

narrative.summary: Course reader starts lesson completion.
narrative.taskDescription: Receive markLessonComplete from the reader and enter the lesson completion feature.

validations.description: The completion action should disable duplicates for the same lesson.

narrative.summary: Completed lesson returns to reader.
narrative.taskDescription: Trigger returnToReader after successful completion and reopen the reader.

validations.description: The reader should show the latest completed state and not treat the lesson as incomplete.

narrative.summary: Blocked lesson completion returns to reader.
narrative.taskDescription: Trigger returnToReader after blocked completion and reopen the reader.

validations.description: The reader should show the failure hint and keep the previous progress counts.

source.sectionTitle: ㉒ Create Course Feature State Machine

narrative.summary: Create course submits a draft.
narrative.taskDescription: Send the new course draft fields while disabling duplicate submissions.

validations.description: Only instructor or admin may enter the flow and the payload should include title, description, category, tags, price, and cover image fields.

narrative.summary: Create course stores a draft.
narrative.taskDescription: Create the course with draft status and bind it to the creator when validation passes.

validations.description: The API should return 201 and create a Course with status=draft and a non-negative price.

narrative.summary: Create course rejects an invalid draft.
narrative.taskDescription: Reject invalid draft creation without writing any partial course row.

validations.description: Validation failures must show field errors and create no malformed course records.

narrative.summary: New course page starts create course feature.
narrative.taskDescription: Receive saveDraft from the new course page and enter the create course feature.

validations.description: Submitting the form should disable duplicates.

narrative.summary: Successful draft creation opens editing.
narrative.taskDescription: Trigger openCreatedCourse after draft creation and open the edit course page for the new course.

validations.description: Navigation should resolve to /instructor/courses/:courseId/edit.

narrative.summary: Rejected draft creation returns to new course page.
narrative.taskDescription: Trigger retryDraft after draft creation fails and reopen the new course page.

validations.description: The page should preserve the necessary error hints so the draft can be corrected and retried.

source.sectionTitle: ㉓ Update Course Feature State Machine

narrative.summary: Update course submits course changes.
narrative.taskDescription: Send the editable course fields while preventing duplicate submissions.

validations.description: Only the author or admin may submit the update flow.

narrative.summary: Update course stores changes.
narrative.taskDescription: Persist allowed course metadata changes and update the course timestamp without changing lifecycle illegally.

validations.description: The API should return 200 and update editable fields plus updated_at.

narrative.summary: Update course rejects invalid changes.
narrative.taskDescription: Reject invalid or unauthorized updates while keeping existing course data unchanged.

validations.description: Validation or permission failures must not produce partial writes.

narrative.summary: Edit page starts update course feature.
narrative.taskDescription: Receive saveCourse from the edit page and enter the update course feature.

validations.description: Submitting from edit page should disable duplicate sends.

narrative.summary: Saved course returns to editing.
narrative.taskDescription: Trigger reopenEditor after saving and reopen the edit page with the latest values.

validations.description: Cover, category, tags, and price should reflect the newly saved values.

narrative.summary: Rejected course update returns to editing.
narrative.taskDescription: Trigger retryEdit after a rejected save and reopen the edit page with correction context.

validations.description: The edit page should keep the necessary error hints for retry.

source.sectionTitle: ㉔ Curriculum Mutation Feature State Machine

narrative.summary: Curriculum mutation submits curriculum changes.
narrative.taskDescription: Send section, lesson, order, content type, and content payloads while preventing duplicate submit.

validations.description: Only the author or admin may update curriculum and submissions must disable duplicates.

narrative.summary: Curriculum mutation stores curriculum changes.
narrative.taskDescription: Persist section and lesson order plus content type and attachment associations.

validations.description: The API should return 200 and persist section and lesson ordering plus content type changes.

narrative.summary: Curriculum mutation rejects invalid changes.
narrative.taskDescription: Reject invalid curriculum writes while preserving the previous consistent curriculum state.

validations.description: Section, lesson, and attachment associations must remain unchanged when rejected.

narrative.summary: Curriculum editor starts curriculum mutation feature.
narrative.taskDescription: Receive saveCurriculum from the curriculum editor and enter the mutation feature.

validations.description: The mutation flow should carry section, lesson, order, content type, and attachment information together.

narrative.summary: Saved curriculum returns to curriculum editor.
narrative.taskDescription: Trigger reopenCurriculum after saving and reopen the curriculum editor.

validations.description: The latest section and lesson ordering should be visible after returning.

narrative.summary: Rejected curriculum mutation returns to curriculum editor.
narrative.taskDescription: Trigger retryCurriculum after a failed mutation and reopen the curriculum editor.

validations.description: The editor should preserve the necessary error hints and keep previous curriculum data intact.

source.sectionTitle: ㉕ Submit Course Feature State Machine

narrative.summary: Submit course sends a review request.
narrative.taskDescription: Submit a valid draft or rejected course for review while preventing duplicate requests.

validations.description: Only draft or rejected courses should enter the submission flow and the actor must be the author or admin.

narrative.summary: Submit course queues review.
narrative.taskDescription: Change course status to submitted and place the course into the review queue.

validations.description: The API should return 200 and update the course status to submitted.

narrative.summary: Submit course rejects an invalid submission.
narrative.taskDescription: Reject illegal state transitions or unauthorized submissions without changing the course state.

validations.description: The course should not enter the review queue when the submission is blocked.

narrative.summary: Instructor courses starts submit course feature.
narrative.taskDescription: Receive submitForReview from the instructor course list and enter the submit course feature.

validations.description: Only draft and rejected courses should expose the submission entry.

narrative.summary: Submitted course returns to instructor courses.
narrative.taskDescription: Trigger returnWithSubmittedCourse after success and reopen instructor course management.

validations.description: The course should appear as submitted and the submit entry should disappear until another legal transition exists.

narrative.summary: Blocked submission returns to instructor courses.
narrative.taskDescription: Trigger returnWithDraftCourse after a blocked submission and reopen instructor course management.

validations.description: The course should keep its previous draft or rejected state and show the block reason.

source.sectionTitle: ㉖ Course Lifecycle Feature State Machine

narrative.summary: Course lifecycle submits an archive action.
narrative.taskDescription: Archive a published course while preventing duplicate archive requests.

validations.description: Only published or archived courses may enter this flow and only the author or admin may act.

narrative.summary: Course lifecycle submits a republish action.
narrative.taskDescription: Republish an archived course while preventing duplicate publish requests.

validations.description: Only published or archived courses may enter this flow and only the author or admin may act.

narrative.summary: Course lifecycle archives the course.
narrative.taskDescription: Persist the archived state and remove the course from the public marketplace.

validations.description: The API should return 200, set status=archived, and update archived_at.

narrative.summary: Course lifecycle blocks archive.
narrative.taskDescription: Reject an archive request that is illegal or unauthorized.

validations.description: The original state and public visibility must remain unchanged when archive is blocked.

narrative.summary: Course lifecycle republishes the course.
narrative.taskDescription: Persist the published state and restore marketplace visibility for the course.

validations.description: The API should return 200 and set status=published with consistent published_at semantics.

narrative.summary: Course lifecycle blocks republish.
narrative.taskDescription: Reject an illegal or unauthorized republish request.

validations.description: The course must remain in its prior archived or original state when republish is blocked.

narrative.summary: Instructor courses starts lifecycle feature.
narrative.taskDescription: Receive togglePublishState from instructor courses and enter the lifecycle feature.

validations.description: Only published or archived courses should expose the lifecycle entry from instructor management.

narrative.summary: Admin courses starts lifecycle feature.
narrative.taskDescription: Receive changeCourseState from admin courses and enter the lifecycle feature.

validations.description: Only published or archived courses should expose the lifecycle entry from admin management.

narrative.summary: Archived lifecycle returns to instructor courses.
narrative.taskDescription: Trigger returnAsInstructor after archiving and reopen instructor course management.

validations.description: The course should show archived and expose republish rather than archive after returning.

narrative.summary: Archived lifecycle returns to admin courses.
narrative.taskDescription: Trigger returnAsAdmin after archiving and reopen admin course management.

validations.description: Admin management and public visibility should both reflect the archived state after returning.

narrative.summary: Published lifecycle returns to instructor courses.
narrative.taskDescription: Trigger returnAsInstructor after republishing and reopen instructor course management.

validations.description: The course should show published and be visible in the public marketplace after returning.

narrative.summary: Published lifecycle returns to admin courses.
narrative.taskDescription: Trigger returnAsAdmin after republishing and reopen admin course management.

validations.description: Admin management and public visibility should both reflect the published state after returning.

narrative.summary: Blocked lifecycle returns to instructor courses.
narrative.taskDescription: Trigger returnBlockedInstructor after a blocked lifecycle change and reopen instructor course management.

validations.description: The course should keep its original state with a visible block reason and no partial success.

narrative.summary: Blocked lifecycle returns to admin courses.
narrative.taskDescription: Trigger returnBlockedAdmin after a blocked lifecycle change and reopen admin course management.

validations.description: The global course data should remain consistent with no partial state update.

source.sectionTitle: ㉗ Review Decision Feature State Machine

narrative.summary: Review decision starts approval.
narrative.taskDescription: Send an approval request for a submitted course while preventing duplicate actions.

validations.description: Only submitted courses should enter the review decision flow and approval buttons must disable during processing.

narrative.summary: Review decision starts rejection.
narrative.taskDescription: Send a rejection request with a required reason for a submitted course.

validations.description: A rejection reason must be present before rejection can complete.

narrative.summary: Review decision stores approval.
narrative.taskDescription: Publish the submitted course and record the review decision metadata.

validations.description: The API should return 200, set the course to published, and create a CourseReview record with admin_id, decision, and timestamp.

narrative.summary: Review decision blocks approval.
narrative.taskDescription: Reject approval when the course is no longer submitted or the action is unauthorized.

validations.description: Blocked approval must not create an invalid review record.

narrative.summary: Review decision stores rejection.
narrative.taskDescription: Reject the submitted course, persist the rejected_reason, and record the review decision.

validations.description: The API should return 200, set the course to rejected, and persist the rejection reason and review record.

narrative.summary: Review decision blocks rejection.
narrative.taskDescription: Reject an invalid rejection attempt when the reason is missing, the state is illegal, or permission is insufficient.

validations.description: Blocked rejection must keep course state and rejected_reason unchanged.

narrative.summary: Admin review starts review decision feature.
narrative.taskDescription: Receive reviewCourse from the review queue and enter the review decision feature.

validations.description: Only submitted courses should enter the feature and rejection must require a reason.

narrative.summary: Approved review returns to admin review.
narrative.taskDescription: Trigger returnToQueue after approval and reopen the review queue.

validations.description: The approved course should no longer appear in the submitted queue and should become visible in the public course list.

narrative.summary: Rejected review returns to admin review.
narrative.taskDescription: Trigger returnToQueue after rejection and reopen the review queue.

validations.description: The rejected course should leave the submitted queue and appear as rejected in instructor management.

narrative.summary: Blocked review returns to admin review.
narrative.taskDescription: Trigger returnToQueue after a blocked review action and reopen the review queue.

validations.description: The submitted queue should remain unchanged with no duplicate or missing items.

source.sectionTitle: ㉘ Taxonomy Mutation Feature State Machine

narrative.summary: Taxonomy mutation submits taxonomy changes.
narrative.taskDescription: Send category or tag create, update, or deactivate changes while preventing duplicate submission.

validations.description: Only admins may enter the taxonomy mutation flow and requests must carry fields such as name and is_active.

narrative.summary: Taxonomy mutation stores taxonomy changes.
narrative.taskDescription: Create or update categories and tags while preserving unique names and active state consistency.

validations.description: The API should return 200 or 201 and persist unique names plus is_active state correctly.

narrative.summary: Taxonomy mutation rejects invalid changes.
narrative.taskDescription: Reject duplicate or invalid taxonomy mutations while keeping taxonomy data consistent.

validations.description: Rejected mutations must not create duplicate names or incorrect deactivation state.

narrative.summary: Admin taxonomy starts taxonomy mutation feature.
narrative.taskDescription: Receive manageTaxonomy from the admin taxonomy page and enter the mutation feature.

validations.description: Only admins may enter the mutation feature and taxonomy consistency must be preserved.

narrative.summary: Saved taxonomy mutation returns to admin taxonomy.
narrative.taskDescription: Trigger returnToTaxonomy after a successful taxonomy mutation and reopen admin taxonomy management.

validations.description: The latest category or tag state should be visible after returning and reusable by course editing flows.

narrative.summary: Rejected taxonomy mutation returns to admin taxonomy.
narrative.taskDescription: Trigger returnToTaxonomy after a rejected taxonomy mutation and reopen admin taxonomy management.

validations.description: The page should preserve the necessary error hints and keep taxonomy data consistent.

source.sectionTitle: ㉙ User Management Feature State Machine

narrative.summary: User management submits a role change.
narrative.taskDescription: Change the primary role of a user using only the supported role set while preventing duplicate submission.

validations.description: Only student, instructor, and admin are valid primary roles and only admins may submit the change.

narrative.summary: User management submits an activation change.
narrative.taskDescription: Toggle a user's active state while preventing duplicate submission.

validations.description: Only admins may submit activation changes and only the selected user's is_active field should change.

narrative.summary: User management stores a role change.
narrative.taskDescription: Persist the new primary role so downstream route and header behavior can reflect it.

validations.description: The API should return 200 and update the user's primary role.

narrative.summary: User management rejects a role change.
narrative.taskDescription: Reject an invalid role change or insufficient-permission request while preserving the user's prior role.

validations.description: Invalid role values or permission errors must leave the original role unchanged.

narrative.summary: User management stores an activation change.
narrative.taskDescription: Persist the user's activation state so disabled accounts can no longer access protected flows.

validations.description: The API should return 200 and update the user's is_active flag.

narrative.summary: User management rejects an activation change.
narrative.taskDescription: Reject an invalid activation request while preserving the user's prior activation state.

validations.description: Permission or data errors must leave the original is_active state unchanged.

narrative.summary: Admin users starts user management feature.
narrative.taskDescription: Receive manageUserAccount from admin users and enter the user management feature.

validations.description: Only admins may enter the feature and role or activation changes must update the corresponding user record.

narrative.summary: Saved user management returns to admin users.
narrative.taskDescription: Trigger returnToUsers after a successful change and reopen admin users.

validations.description: The list should show the latest role and activation state and stay consistent with user counts.

narrative.summary: Rejected user management returns to admin users.
narrative.taskDescription: Trigger returnToUsers after a rejected change and reopen admin users.

validations.description: The list should keep the original data and show the relevant error hint with no partial update.

meta.notes: Generated incrementally from transition.md and spec.md without external generators.
